observations.axis: Words as Burden vs. Words as Impact
observations.polarity: Words settle and sink vs. Words are active agents
observations.summary: The dualism contrasts the passive settling of words, likened to stones sinking quietly, with the active impact words have on the individual, implying an internalization that is both heavy and unavoidable.

left_evidence.quote: The words settled into him like stones dropped into still water, sinking before he could stop them.

right_evidence.quote: The words settled into him like stones dropped into still water, sinking before he could stop them.
